Metadata.description: A custom public search frontend powered by a private SearXNG backend.

SearchForm.defaultPlaceholder: Search the web or switch to images…

Search.readyDescription: Start with a query, then switch between web, images, videos, and news without leaving this page.
Search.noResultsDescription: Try a broader query, switch to another tab, or reduce your filters.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Customize how AdminSearch searches, displays, and handles results.
Settings.cookieDefaultsDescription: Saved settings are persisted in your browser. The subset already supported by the current search pipeline is applied as default behavior.

general.label: General
general.description: Locale, default tab, and result defaults.

interface.label: Interface
interface.description: Theme, density, and result link behavior.

privacy.label: Privacy
privacy.description: Proxying, tracker cleaning, and local storage.

general.title: General
general.description: Web search and direct-answer style sources.

videos.title: Videos
videos.description: Video result backends, including optional alternates.

general.searchLocaleDescription: Locale-style values so region-aware engines can be added later.
general.defaultTabDescription: The landing tab for a new search.
general.safeSearchDescription: Default content filtering level for searches.
general.timeRangeDescription: Applied automatically until you override it from the search page.
general.faviconResolverDescription: Which upstream resolver fetches favicons for result rows.
general.httpMethodDescription: How AdminSearch sends search requests to the SearXNG backend.
general.loadMoreDescription: Batch size for appended results when loading more.
general.resultReuseDescription: Choose whether revisiting an already loaded search view fetches again or restores cached results for 30 minutes.
general.engineTokensDescription: Private engine tokens are read from the server environment and are never stored in browser settings.

interface.uiLanguageDescription: AdminSearch interface language, separate from search locale.
interface.appearanceDescription: Use light or dark mode, or follow your system preference.
interface.themeDescription: Choose the color theme used in both light and dark mode.
interface.openNewTabDescription: Links from results open in a new browser tab.
interface.urlFormattingDescription: Choose how result URLs are displayed below each title.
interface.infiniteScrollDescription: Automatically load more results when you reach the end of the list.
interface.showFaviconsDescription: Useful on web and news results; less important on image-heavy views.
interface.compactDensityDescription: Denser results layout with tighter spacing.
interface.queryTitleDescription: Include the current search query in the browser tab title.

privacy.imageProxyDescription: Proxy remote result images through the backend instead of loading directly from origin sites.
privacy.trackerCleanerDescription: Strip known tracking parameters from outgoing result URLs.
privacy.doiRewriteDescription: Prefer open-access DOI mirrors when available.
privacy.storeDefaultsDescription: Persist settings across browser restarts. Disable this to keep them only for the current browser session.

engines.title: Engines
engines.description: Pick which engines run for each search category. Based on the engines enabled in your SearXNG config.

special.title: Special queries
special.description: Inline helpers that answer simple questions inside search results.
special.calculatorDescription: Quick math answers inside search results.
special.unitConverterDescription: Convert between units directly from queries.

Privacy.title: Privacy
Privacy.intro: AdminSearch is designed to minimize data collection while providing search through a private SearXNG backend.
Privacy.searchRequestsBody: Search and autocomplete terms are sent to the AdminSearch server and then to its private SearXNG service. SearXNG contacts the selected external search providers and returns their results. AdminSearch does not require an account and does not include client-side analytics or advertising trackers.
Privacy.browserStorageBody: Preferences are stored in a first-party cookie for up to one year, or for the current session if persistent storage is disabled. Language and storage choices use local or session storage. If result reuse is enabled, recent search results can be kept in session storage for up to 30 minutes. The cookie is sent only to AdminSearch; local and session storage stay on your device. All of this data can be removed through your browser's site data controls.
Privacy.rateLimitingBody: The server may use your IP address as part of a temporary Redis/Valkey rate-limit key. The key expires after the configured rate-limit window, which is one minute by default. AdminSearch does not maintain a separate account database or server-side search history.
Privacy.externalContentBody: Favicons are fetched by the AdminSearch server from Google or DuckDuckGo. Result thumbnails are loaded from their source, and optional video previews can connect your browser to providers such as YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, or Odysee. Favicons and thumbnails can be disabled in settings.
Privacy.hostingBody: The maintained deployment is hosted on Railway in Amsterdam. Railway processes the network and technical request data needed to operate the service, and infrastructure logs may include request metadata. Self-hosted AdminSearch instances may use different providers, logging, and retention settings.
Privacy.sourceBody: AdminSearch is open source. You can review the code or contact the maintainer through the <link>GitHub repository</link>.
